title.zh: SwiftUI 在大型產品的落地經驗

description.zh: 分享 SwiftUI 在大型產品中的實際落地經驗，包含架構選擇、效能挑戰與踩過的坑。
description.en: A practical look at adopting SwiftUI in large-scale products, covering architectural choices, performance challenges, and lessons learned.

title.zh: LLM / RAG / Agent 在真實產品的應用
title.en: LLM, RAG, and Agents in Real Products

description.zh: 不是 Demo，是上線之後的故事。分享 LLM、RAG、Agent 在真實產品中的應用經驗與踩坑紀錄。
description.en: Not a demo, but the story after launch: lessons from applying LLMs, RAG, and agents in real production environments.

title.zh: 從 0 到 1 的建立，或從 1 到 100 的擴張
title.en: Building from 0 to 1, or Scaling from 1 to 100

description.zh: 產品決策、成長實驗、商業模式轉彎——從零到一的建立，或從一到百的擴張，都有值得分享的故事。
description.en: Product decisions, growth experiments, and business model pivots: stories worth sharing from early creation to later-stage scaling.

title.zh: Swift 6 Concurrency 實戰：踩坑與解法
title.en: Swift 6 Concurrency in Practice: Pitfalls and Fixes

description.zh: Swift 6 的 Concurrency 改動讓不少開發者踩坑，本場分享實際遇到的問題與解法，幫助你少走彎路。
description.en: Swift 6 concurrency changes have surprised many developers. This session shares real issues, practical fixes, and migration lessons.

title.zh: On-device ML：把模型塞進 iPhone 後發生了什麼事
title.en: On-device ML: What Happens After Putting Models on iPhone

description.zh: 把模型塞進 iPhone 後發生了什麼事？分享 Core ML、MLX 的實作經驗，以及 on-device 推論的效能挑戰。
description.en: What happens after putting models on iPhone? A practical session on Core ML, MLX, and the performance challenges of on-device inference.
